subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.24
question_html:
What is the pH of 0.001 mol dm−3 NaOH (aq)?

A. 1

B. 3

C. 11

D. 13
examiners_html: 77 % of the candidates were able to calculate the pH of the aqueous solution of NaOH. The most commonly chosen distractor was D (pH = 13) which was probably selected because NaOH is a strong base.
